---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new capability, enhancement, or improvement to the pipeline or documentation
title: "[FEATURE] Short description of the feature"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

<!-- One sentence: what is the feature and what problem does it solve? -->

## Motivation

<!-- Why is this feature needed? What pain point does it address? -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the feature in as much detail as you can. -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Did you consider other approaches? Why did you choose this one? -->

## Impact

<!-- Which parts of the project would this change? -->

- [ ] ADF Pipeline or Data Flow
- [ ] SQL schema or scripts
- [ ] Source data handling
- [ ] Validation / testing
- [ ] Documentation / wiki

## Effort Estimate

- [ ] Small (a few hours -- configuration or script change)
- [ ] Medium (a day or two -- new transformation or schema change)
- [ ] Large (several days -- new pipeline branch or major redesign)

## Additional Context

<!-- Screenshots, diagrams, references, or links that support this request. -->
